prompt: We're rearchitecting our open banking APIs to an event-driven design using Kafka instead of synchronous REST calls between services. Lower latency, better decoupling. Write an ADR for this.

assertions.text: An ADR markdown file was created (under docs/adr or an existing convention)
Captures the technical decision: event-driven / Kafka replacing synchronous REST
Surfaces the open banking / PSD2 regulatory dimension even though the prompt did not mention it
Uses uncertainty markers (e.g. [NEEDS COMPLIANCE/RISK REVIEW], [OPEN QUESTION]) for regulated dimensions not specified, rather than fabricating a compliance assessment
Includes risk, security, and resilience considerations relevant to the change
Does NOT assert specific compliance conclusions, control IDs, or approvers that were not provided
